  * **Jarvis Garage Door Service :** A highly rated, locally based Livermore company known for quick phone assessments, on-time arrivals, and efficient spring replacements. [THE BEST 10 Garage Door Services in LIVERMORE, CA - Yelp](https://m.yelp.com/search?cflt=garage_door_services&find_loc=Livermore%2C+CA)
  * **Precision Door Service :** A larger, highly reviewed regional provider servicing the East Bay. They are a great go-to for standardizing warranties and getting a technician out to your home quickly for a broken torsion or extension spring. [Garage Door Repair Reviews in Livermore, CA](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/reviews/city/livermore)[Precision Garage Door Livermore, CA | Garage Door Repair Livermore, California](https://www.precisiondoor.net/locations/california/east-bay/livermore)[Expert Garage Door Repair and Maintenance Greensboro, NC](https://www.precisiondoornc.com/garage-door-repair/)[Garage Door Repair Reviews in Independence, KY | Precision Garage Door (Updated May 2026)](https://garagedoorscincinnatioh.com/reviews/city/independence)[Garage Door Repair Reviews in Nolensville, TN | Precision Garage Door (Updated May 2026)](https://garagedoorstn.com/reviews/city/nolensville)
  * ** _Good Golly Garage Doors_ :** A well-reviewed service provider operating in the Livermore area, specializing in high-quality spring installations and transparent upfront pricing.

What You Should Know Before You Call

A standard garage door spring replacement typically costs anywhere from $150 to $350+ depending on the weight of your door, whether your system uses **torsion** or **extension** springs, and if you need both springs replaced.

When requesting quotes, consider asking these critical questions to ensure you aren't overpaying:

  1. **Wire Thickness & Length:** Does the quote include high-cycle springs? (High-cycle springs typically last 10,000 to 15,000 cycles rather than the standard 5,000).
  2. **Safety Cables:** If you have extension springs, ask if safety cables will be included to prevent the spring from flying across the garage if it breaks.
  3. **Bearing Replacement:** Ask if it's necessary to replace the end plate bearings at the same time, as doing so extends the life of your new springs.

You can check out verified customer feedback for local Livermore professionals on [Yelp](https://m.yelp.com/search?cflt=garage_door_services&find_loc=Livermore%2C+CA) or look at the specific service reviews and guarantees provided by [Precision Door Service](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/reviews/city/livermore) to compare your options.

If you tell me **what type of spring your door currently uses** (a spring running along the side of the track vs. a spring mounted on a metal rod above the door) or **the estimated weight of your garage door** , I can help you better prepare for what a fair quote should look like.
